title: dianthus cretaceus
intro: Dianthus cretaceus, also known as the Cretan pink or pink saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is native to the island of Crete and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits such as soothing and calming effects. Herbal preparations of Dianthus cretaceus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
